programmes.show_description: A flood forces the Desert Diggers to call for help. Plus, new technology leads Jacqui and Andrew to a massive haul of gold. S10, Ep11
The Veterans. Paul Mackie's team have just six days to help a team of ex-servicemen become skilled mobile goldminers and reach their dream of funding a veteran's charity. S1, Ep4

programmes.show_description: Henry and Simon are in Surrey to look through the possessions of a motorbike collector. The first thing they spot is a couple of iconic Kawasaki Ninjas. S4, Ep7

programmes.show_name: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programmes.show_description: Henry and Simon return to Surrey to look through the garage of an accountant. It's more organised than they are used to but means they quickly find a stylish Danish rocking chair. S4, Ep8

programmes.show_name: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programmes.show_description: Henry and Simon are in Dumfries to look through a farmer's barn. When not chasing chickens, they manage to find an old cabinet, some ornate stools and some sheep shearing aids. S4, Ep9

Raj Bisram and Natasha Raskin Sharp head to their final auction in Cambridge. Plus, Natasha discovers the story of a bare-knuckle fighting champion. S20, Ep25

programmes.show_name: New: Shed And Buried: Classic Cars
programmes.show_description: Model T Ford. Henry and Fuzz arrive at Cheltenham and find Andy's vintage Model T Ford, which is in desperate need of restoration. Are they up to the task? S4, Ep3
Henry and Sam are in the Cotswolds to visit the largest sidecar manufacturer in Britain. They uncover a rusty Lancia Aurelia and a Royal Enfield 500. S3, Ep1
In Somerset, Sam and Henry meet a man who's been collecting cars since 1963. The guys are excited to uncover an Austin 7 and a De Dion-Bouton. S3, Ep2
